title: Herbology, O.W.L. Style
prose: Professor Sprout has stopped letting anyone coast. This term's Herbology is all O.W.L. syllabus — Bubotubers, whose pus you're now trusted to squeeze into bottles without an adult standing over you, and a written test on magical-plant properties that catches out more than half the class.

"You will not get a Dragon Dung Fertiliser question wrong on your O.W.L. and blame me for it," she says, not unkindly, handing back a stack of marked essays with rather more red ink on them than usual.

choices.label: Take the warning seriously and revise properly.
File it under 'later problems' for now.
